meta.title: Punishers Germany - Esports Organization
meta.description: Your new home in esports. Join the Punishers Germany family!

hero.title: Punishers Germany
hero.subtitle: Your new home in esports
hero.description: We're an up-and-coming esports organization nurturing talent and building a passionate community. Join our journey!

teams_section.heading: Our Teams
teams_section.description: Meet the players representing us on the battlefield, proudly carrying our colors.

creators_section.heading: Our Content Creators
creators_section.description: Discover the personalities who entertain and inspire our community and carry our values out into the world.

join_section.heading: Join the Punishers Germany family!
join_section.description: Whether you're an aspiring esports athlete, a creative content creator, or simply a passionate fan - we want you!
join_section.player_description: You're a talented esports athlete looking for a team that pushes and supports you? Apply now and show us what you've got!
join_section.creator_description: You love creating content, sharing your passion and building a community? Join our creator team!
join_section.community_description: Join our growing Discord community, meet like-minded people and never miss any news!

contact_section.heading: Contact Us
contact_section.description: Got questions, suggestions, or want to work with us? We'd love to hear from you!
